title: 2 Selection of Bus Operator for Procurement, Supply, Operation and Maintenance of 3,604 Electric Buses and Development of Allied Electric and Civil Infrastructure on Gross Cost Contracting (GCC) under PM-eBus Sewa (Tender 3) CESL/06/2026-27/PM-eBus Sewa3/262704003 1982 22-04-2026 07-07-2026 upto (15
display_title: Selection of Bus Operator for 3,604 Electric Buses under PM-eBus Sewa (Tender 3)
why_it_matters: One of the largest active e-bus tenders in India. GCC model means operator funds buses + infra; risk on ops quality and utilisation. Significant revenue visibility for winning OEM.
key_risks: Multi-city coordination risk; depot allocation by STUs; grid availability for high-capacity charging.
eligibility_summary: Bus operators with experience in GCC-model electric bus operations. Qualification criteria specified in RFQ document.

title: 134 Selection of Bus Operator for Procurement, Supply, Operation & Maintenance and Development of Allied Electric & Civil Infrastructure on Gross Cost Contracting (GCC) for 2,900 Electric Buses under PM E-DRIVE Scheme Tender-II & 3,330 for Delhi totaling to 6,230 number of electric buses. CESL/06/20

status_history.details: Tender issued by CESL (IFB published; date per CESL/trade-press, exact portal date unconfirmed)
Techno-commercial bids opened (per CESL portal + trade press: Sustainable Bus, electrive).

display_title: Selection of Bus Operator for 6,230 Electric Buses under PM E-DRIVE Scheme (Tender II)
why_it_matters: One consolidated tender for 6,230 electric buses (2,900 under PM E-DRIVE Tender-II plus 3,330 for Delhi). Bids opened 23 February 2026 and submission closed 10 March 2026; the tender is currently under bid evaluation, with multiple operators having bid across all five packages. No award confirmed. An award would be a major OEM order.
key_risks: Under bid evaluation — no award confirmed and the evaluation timeline is not published. Large Delhi component (3,330 buses) adds political/regulatory complexity.
eligibility_summary: Bus operators with GCC experience. Delhi portion (3,330 buses) is part of the same consolidated 6,230-bus tender.
notes: Consolidated tender totalling 6,230 buses (2,900 PM E-DRIVE Tender-II + 3,330 Delhi). Bids opened 23 February 2026; submission closed 10 March 2026; currently under bid evaluation, no award confirmed. Verified against CESL portal, Sustainable Bus, and electrive.
